316 I5950_PSYCHTC_CD I5950_PSYCHTC_CD I5950 Active Diagnoses: Psychotic Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident had an active diagnosis of psychotic disorder (other than schizophrenia) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
